basic_details.job_title: EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Engineering Projects India (EPI) (EPI) Graduate Apprentice (Civil) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 May 2026 on the official website https://www.epi.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 to 30 years who have a BE/B.Tech (Civil) degree with minimum 55% marks are eligible to apply for this Graduate Apprentice post. The online/email application process for EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 has started on 02 May 2026 and will remain open until 05 June 2026. Candidates can download the officia

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: 05 years for SC/ST & 03 years for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer)

qualification.details: Graduate Apprentice (Civil): BE/B.Tech (Civil) with not less than 55% marks from a reputed Institute/University approved by AICTE. Candidates should not have completed three years after passing out of the qualifying examination as on 05 June 2026. Candidates awaiting results of the minimum qualification prescribed need not apply. Candidates who have undergone apprentice training in any other organization need not apply.

salary_details.details: Graduate Apprentice: Rs. 10,000/- per month. No output bonus or other incentive or any perks and allowances.

selection_process: Shortlisted on the basis of merit list formed on the basis of marks secured in Minimum required Educational Qualification.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
